source.name: Epoch AI — Notable AI Models
source.caveat: Training-compute figures are Epoch AI estimates with varying confidence; not all models report compute/cost/power.

methodology.doublingTimeMethod: OLS regression of log10(training compute) on decimal year
methodology.notes: Descriptive historical trends only — not a forecast.

caveats: Coverage is not exhaustive; Epoch curates 'notable' models.
Compute estimates carry uncertainty (see Confidence field).
Future-dated entries reflect the source snapshot and are shown as-is.
Multi-country collaboration models are co-attributed to each participating country in the country leaderboard.
